title: Sakura SS5324 Car Wheel Brace/Wrench - Extendable Handle - Socket Sizes 17 mm, 19 mm, 21 mm, 23 mm - FITS All Standard Vehicles
features: The Sakura wheel brace/ Wrench is multi-use as it has 2 Reversible drive sockets and a 3rd for other inserts
The two reversible sockets are 17mm, 19mm, 21mm and 23mm. The 3rd drive socket takes 1/2" Inserts.
The soft handle extends from 355mm to 540mm to provide extra leverage for releasing tight wheel nuts
Strong, durable and small enough to keep in the boot
description: From the manufacturer The Sakura Extendable Wheel Wrench has a anti-slip grip telescopic handle, which extends to 540mm to provide extra leverage for releasing tight wheel nuts. It comes complete with 2 reversible drive sockets (17mm/19mm & 21mm/23mm). The wrench can also be used with other ½” drive sockets. Extends from 355mm to 540mm for extra leverage Two reversible drive sockets (17mm/19mm & 21mm/23mm) ½″ drive socket usable for other inserts Anti-slip handle Strong and durable Product Features Extendable Handle The Sakura Extendable Wheel Wrench is designed with an anti-slip grip telescopic handle that extends from 355mm to 540mm, offering you extra leverage when tackling tight or stubborn wheel nuts. The ability to extend the handle gives you the added force needed to loosen wheel nuts more easily, particularly those that are over-tightened or rusted. This feature makes the wrench incredibly effective for a variety of vehicles, ensuring that you can handle wheel changes with less effort and greater ease, whether you’re at home or on the roadside. Reversible Sockets The Sakura Extendable Wheel Wrench comes complete with two reversible drive sockets (17mm/19mm & 21mm/23mm), ensuring compatibility with a wide range of vehicles. This flexibility allows you to work on different car makes and models without needing multiple tools. Additionally, the wrench's ½” drive is compatible with a variety of other standard inserts, making it a truly versatile tool for automotive enthusiasts, professional mechanics, and DIY users alike. Whether you're working on a car, van, or even larger vehicles, the wrench provides the adaptability you need. Maximum Comfort and Control Featuring an anti-slip handle, the Sakura Extendable Wheel Wrench is designed for comfort and durability during prolonged use. The ergonomic design ensures that you have a secure and comfortable hold, reducing the risk of hand strain or slippage, even when working in tough conditions. Whether you're using it to change a flat tyre or perform maintenance on your vehicle, the strong, durable construction, ensures that every task is completed with confidence and ease. Our Range SS5324 Extendable Wheel Wrench The Sakura Extendable Wheel Wrench has a anti-slip grip telescopic handle, which extends to 540mm to provide extra leverage for releasing tight wheel nuts. It comes complete with 2 reversible drive sockets (17mm/19mm & 21mm/23mm). The wrench can also be used with other ½” drive sockets. Extends from 355mm to 540mm for extra leverage Two reversible drive sockets (17mm/19mm & 21mm/23mm) ½″ drive socket usable for other inserts Anti-slip handle Strong and durable WB4W Wheel Brace-13/16″ 17 19 22mm The Sakura Wheel Brace is a high-quality, durable tool designed for easy and efficient wheel nut removal. With a robust 13/16″ size and three commonly used socket sizes (17mm, 19mm, and 22mm), this versatile wheel brace ensures compatibility with a wide range of vehicles, from cars to vans. The 13/16″ connection provides a secure fit, allowing you to apply maximum torque when loosening or tightening wheel nuts. Whether you're a professional mechanic or a DIY enthusiast, this wheel brace offers the reliability and strength you need to get the job done quickly and effectively. Its compact design makes it easy to store in your vehicle or toolbox, ensuring you're always prepared for a flat tyre or maintenance work. Product Dimensions – 27.50 x 27.50 x 3.50 cm 13/16″ 17, 19, 22mm
